_about: Live system state. Read first; do not hard-code values that appear here. The Google Calendar IDs / user email under `calendar_config` are the only fields a new user MUST fill in before first run.

calendar_config._about: Was originally hard-coded in gcal_todo_instructions.md; moved here so a new user can fill these in without editing prose. Fill in your own calendars before the first Google-Calendar-touching run.

todo_calendars.name: <display name, e.g. Events>
todo_calendars.notes: Main to-do calendar. Personal tasks, reminders, things to do.

excluded_calendars.name: <display name, e.g. Meetings>
excluded_calendars.reason: Scheduled meetings with other people — never to-dos.

pruning_rules.archive_docx_keep: newest N, delete oldest when count > max

landmarks._about: Named future dates used as `snooze_until` targets (e.g. 'move_day', 'semester_start'). Empty by default; you add entries like "move_day": "2026-08-15" as they become relevant.
